# Copilot Instructions for parradigital.github.io

## Repository Overview
This is a GitHub Pages repository for parra.digital website. It uses Jekyll for static site generation.

## Key Guidelines

### Project Structure
- `/docs/` - Contains the main website content
- Jekyll configuration files and content are in the root or docs directory
- Generated site output goes to `_site/` (ignored by git)

### Development Practices
- This is a static website hosted on GitHub Pages
- Follow Jekyll conventions and best practices
- Keep content simple and maintainable
- Ensure all changes are compatible with GitHub Pages

### Build and Test
- Jekyll builds are handled automatically by GitHub Pages
- Test locally with Jekyll if making significant changes
- Verify that changes don't break the site structure

### Code Style
- Follow standard Markdown formatting for content
- Use clear, semantic HTML when needed
- Keep CSS and JavaScript minimal and well-organized

### Documentation
- Update README.md when making significant structural changes
- Document any custom Jekyll plugins or configurations
- Keep instructions clear for future contributors

## Common Tasks
- Content updates: Modify files in the `/docs/` directory
- Styling changes: Update CSS files following existing patterns
- Configuration: Modify Jekyll config files as needed
